text: Doctor ne phir keh diya ki ye sab bas 'stress' hai, par unhe kya pata ki bedridden sasur ji ki seva aur bacchon ki zimmedari ke beech mere paas thakne ka bhi waqt nahi hai. Saas kehti hain ki ye toh har bahu ka farz hai, isliye main apna dard daba kar bas chalti ja rahi hoon kyunki agar main ruki toh poora ghar bikhar jayega. Mujhe endurance hi dikhani hogi kyunki mere paas koi aur support system nahi hai.

Dementia se jujh rahe pitaji ki caregiving aur ghar ke kalesh ne mujhe tod diya hai, par Doctor ne meri takleef ko bas 'stress' bol kar dismiss kar diya. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki bimar baap ko chhod kar apni mental health pe dhyan doon, kyunki log kya kahenge ki beti ne farz nahi nibhaya. Thakan se badan toot raha hai par structural endurance hi mera ekmatra rasta hai.

Hospital ka kharcha aur saas-bahu ke jhagdon ke beech main ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas seva karti hai, bhale hi Doctor ne meri ghabrahat ko mamuli stress bataya ho. Career gap toh pehle hi dukh deta tha, ab ye caregiving burnout bhi mujhe rukne nahi deta kyunki mujh par poore khandaan ka bojh hai. Main thak chuki hoon par 'duty' ke aage mere dard ki koi keemat nahi hai.

Jab Doctor ne kaha ki ye sab dimaag ka khel hai, toh mujhe laga ki shayad meri thakan ka koi wajood hi nahi hai, par sasur ji ki bimari toh real hai na? Main chah kar bhi break nahi le sakti kyunki joint family mein bahu ka rukkna 'natak' mana jata hai. Mujh par child pressure bhi hai aur caregiving ka bojh bhi, par endurance hi mera asli dharma hai.

Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par unhe nahi dikhta ki bedridden mareez ki seva karte-karte meri apni identity kho gayi hai. Main apni takleef share nahi karti kyunki ghar mein sabko lagta hai ki ye toh mera farz hai aur rona kamzori ki nishani hai. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki ghar ka koi kaam ruke, isliye bas bina ruke ek structural endurance dikha rahi hoon.
